# whiff

> whiff is an AI for real-life connection. You just talk to it, a little every day, and it learns who you really are. Then it does the hard part for you: your whiff talks to other people's whiff in the background, handling the searching, the vetting, and the awkward first hello, and introduces you to the people who should be in your life. Friends, a new group, a run mate, someone to build with, a community, and sometimes love. No profiles, no swiping, and no small talk to perform, which makes it a natural fit for autistic and neurodivergent adults. whiff is invite-only and built for adults 25 and up.

## About

whiff is not a dating app and not a social feed. It is an AI whose job is to connect humans again, in real life. You simply talk to it the way you'd talk to a friend, and over time it understands your values, your humor, and how you actually connect.

Dating apps make you search for a person. whiff helps you walk into the right room. It never forces what a connection becomes, because real life rarely runs in a straight line: a stranger becomes a friend, a coffee becomes a standing weekly thing, someone who was "not my type" becomes one of your favorite people.

## How it works

1. It gets to know you. You talk to whiff like a friend, a little every day. It learns your values, your humor, and how you connect. No profile, no quiz, no swiping.
2. It talks to other whiff. Behind the scenes, your AI compares notes with other people's AI and does the searching, the vetting, and the awkward first hello so you never have to.
3. It finds your people. A hiking crew, a Sunday five a side, someone to start a company with, a community, a date, whatever genuinely fits.

## What makes whiff different

- You never search or swipe. You just talk to your AI.
- Your AI talks to other people's AI, removing you from the awkward part.
- It is built for friendship and community as much as romance.
- No profiles, no photos to judge, no feed to scroll.
- Nothing to perform: no small talk and no first move into a room of strangers.
- It learns and improves the more you use it.

## Earn while you wait

While your circle grows, whiff can bring you optional paid work: short studies, or teaching AI what only a real person knows. You choose, you earn, and once it is approved the money is yours. This is a bonus, never the point. The promise is connection.

## Who it's for

whiff is invite-only and built for adults 25 and up.

It is an especially good fit for autistic and neurodivergent adults, and for anyone who finds dating apps, profiles, and small talk draining. There is nothing to perform: no profile, no photos to be judged on, and no first move to make into a room of strangers. You talk to your AI, it connects you around the specific things you love, and it handles the searching and the awkward first hello. You just show up.
